coordinate_system: original source-image pixels; PCB coordinates in millimetres
promotion_rule: the native conductor establishes topology and value; the .009 drawing establishes target refdes/placement identity; the owner photo establishes the populated terminals and board fit; direct owner continuity independently closes D13.13 to D105.10

sources.observation: upper-left native conductor labels 107B -BLOCK, junctions directly to D13.13/H, and carries R1 2k to rail A (+5 V)
factory .009 assembly drawing labels horizontal R1 directly between D13 and D105
owner component view shows the populated red-black-red 2 kOhm axial body between the independently registered D13 and D105 packages

package_orientation.observation: the owner component view shows the complete package directly below R1 with the same right-facing notch posture; the factory .009 centre is retained while the photographed notch corrects the old 90-degree orientation

terminals.observation: right-hand terminal beside the D13.14 +5 V departure
left-hand terminal on the H/-BLOCK branch
